name: feminist-quote
description: Share empowering feminist quotes from a collection of 117 quotes
description_long: This skill adds the ability to share empowering feminist quotes. When a user mentions 'quote', 'empowerment', 'strength', or other related keywords, the bot will respond with a relevant quote from our collection of 117 quotes by trailblazing women including Maya Angelou, Gloria Steinem, bell hooks, Audre Lorde, Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie, and many more.
